step_rationale: HF-specific remodeling candidate; plausibly reflects cardiomyocyte injury/remodeling rather than atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: MYOZ1 influences cardiomyocyte structural adaptation and remodeling in response to ischemic injury and heart failure.

references.title: Shared Genetic Liability Between Heart Failure and Myocardial Infarction Revealed by Genome-Wide Cross-Trait Analysis.
references.journal: Journal of cardiovascular pharmacology and therapeutics
